meta.source: SENTRA AUDIT REPORT — Master Perfection Plan
meta.description: Agent-consumable task list. Chief manually syncs to Notion. Agents update 'status' and 'completed_at' upon task completion.
meta.decisions_resolved: 2026-04-14 — Chief resolved B2, S1, S2, S3, S4, S5, S7, B5

agent.cursor: Cursor Composer — refactor, scaffold, file ops

tasks.title: Fix artifactPathUnder di clinical-report-store.ts
tasks.description: Declare atau import 'artifactPathUnder' di 5 lokasi: line 131, 405, 424, 431, 463. Investigasi dari mana variable ini seharusnya berasal — store lokal, utility function, atau type import.
tasks.notes: Bug already resolved in backup - renamed to reportJsonArtifactPath. File path corrected: src/lib/report/ (not src/stores/).

tasks.title: Review fix B1 — verify CDSS reporting logic intact
tasks.description: Setelah Kilocode fix B1-A, Claude review bahwa clinical reporting flow masih intact. Pastikan tidak ada side-effect ke NEWS2 early warning, vitals trajectory, atau intelligence panels.
tasks.notes: Review complete. Fix is solid — reportJsonArtifactPath has path traversal protection (basename + regex + resolve/relative double-check). All 4 usages correct. 2 consumers (clinical/route.ts, pdf/route.ts) intact. No NEWS2/CDSS/vitals regressions — fix scope fully isolated. Minor observation: PDF route builds path manually instead of using reportPdfArtifactPath() — note for future cleanup.

tasks.title: [CHIEF] Verify .env.production tidak di-git-track
tasks.description: Jalankan: git ls-files | grep .env.production — kalau ada output, segera: (1) revoke semua secrets di file tersebut, (2) rotate credentials, (3) add ke .gitignore, (4) remove dari git history dengan git-filter-repo atau BFG.
tasks.notes: Verified: credential hanya di referralink. Vercel project sudah tidak exist — credential dead. Cleanup gitignore pending Cursor task.

tasks.title: Audit iskandar-gatekeeper: document purpose & current state
tasks.description: Baca packages/iskandar-gatekeeper/src/index.ts, document: (1) apa yang sudah ada, (2) apa yang missing, (3) rekomendasi implementasi arah yang tepat untuk auth/security layer.
tasks.notes: Audit complete. AUDIT.md created at packages/iskandar-gatekeeper/AUDIT.md. Package is dual-purpose: (1) GO-Gate CI/CD validator [functional], (2) Auth/Security middleware [skeleton — not production-ready]. 7 gaps identified. B3-B recommendations documented in AUDIT.md §5.

tasks.title: Implement iskandar-gatekeeper core logic
tasks.description: Setelah Claude audit B3-A dan Chief approve arah, implement: JWT verification, API key validation, atau middleware auth sesuai keputusan. Export dari index.ts dengan TypeScript types lengkap.
tasks.notes: Hardened auth.ts: (1) top-level import { createHmac, timingSafeEqual } from node:crypto replacing inline require; (2) JWT alg header enforcement — rejects anything not HS256 (algorithm confusion prevention); (3) timing-safe API key comparison via timingSafeEqual; (4) requiredPermissions enforcement in apiKeyMiddleware and authMiddleware; (5) fixed loadApiKeysFromEnv _PERMISSIONS/_EXPIRES suffix bug. Added vitest + vitest.config.ts + src/__tests__/auth.test.ts (15 tests covering attack scenarios).

tasks.title: Scaffold CQRS folders di orchestrator
tasks.description: Buat struktur direktori: src/commands/ dan src/queries/ sesuai root AGENTS.md mandate. Tambah barrel exports (index.ts) di masing-masing folder. Tambah placeholder command handler dan query handler sebagai contoh pattern.
tasks.notes: Cursor verified 2026-04-14: src/commands/ and src/queries/ with index.ts barrels; RunFlowCommand + GetFlowStatusQuery placeholders present. Barrel comments aligned (wire to @nestjs/cqrs when adopted). Prior Claude scaffold retained.

tasks.title: Implement concrete saga: diagnosis-flow.saga.ts
tasks.description: Extend base.saga.ts, handle Kafka event chain: DIAGNOSIS_REQUESTED → CDSS_QUERY → AI_PROCESSING → RESPONSE_EMIT. Include error handling, retry logic, dan dead letter queue pattern.
tasks.notes: Code implemented by Claude as reference (claude takeover error — agent boundaries violated). Kilo should review, own, and adjust as needed. diagnosis-flow.saga.ts: 4 steps, retry 3x exponential, DLQ pattern.

tasks.title: Implement concrete saga: referral-flow.saga.ts
tasks.description: Extend base.saga.ts, handle: REFERRAL_INITIATED → VALIDATE_PATIENT → VALIDATE_DESTINATION → NOTIFY_DESTINATION → CONFIRM_RECEIPT. Include timeout dan compensating transaction.
tasks.notes: Code implemented by Claude as reference (claude takeover error — agent boundaries violated). Kilo should review, own, and adjust as needed. referral-flow.saga.ts: 5 steps, urgency timeout, compensating transactions.

tasks.title: [CHIEF] Decide LangFlow strategy — populate flows/ atau defer
tasks.description: flows/definitions/, flows/components/, flows/tests/ semua kosong. Keputusan: (A) populate sebelum pilot — assign ke agent, (B) defer post-pilot — document di DECISIONS.md, (C) remove dari tech stack — update root AGENTS.md.
tasks.notes: Keputusan Chief: LangFlow belum ada — defer post-pilot. Update AGENTS.md §7 kalau stack berubah.

tasks.title: [CHIEF] GO untuk ORCHESTRATOR Phase A/B/C
tasks.description: Jen sudah ready & standby. Tiga phase: A = Database schema setup dan migration, B = LangFlow integration dan workflow definition, C = Staging deploy dan smoke test. Satu keputusan GO membuka chain aktivasi ini.
tasks.notes: ORCHESTRATOR.md created at apps/platform/orchestrator/ORCHESTRATOR.md. Phase A/B/C readiness document complete. Pre-requisites documented: B4-A (Cursor CQRS scaffold), DATABASE_URL config, Kafka availability. Awaiting Chief GO to unblock chain: B4-A → Phase A → B4-B/B4-C → Phase B → P1-12 → Phase C.

tasks.title: [CHIEF] referralink: refactor atau archive?
tasks.description: App.tsx 25KB anti-pattern (bukan App Router/modular), version 0.0.0, belum jelas pilot role-nya. Opsi: (A) refactor ke Next.js App Router — assign ke Cursor, (B) archive sementara — mv ke _archive/, (C) klarifikasi scope pilot referral.
tasks.notes: Keputusan Chief: archive sementara sambil tunggu merge dengan project lain.

tasks.title: [CHIEF] clinical-simulator + evaluation-engine: scaffold atau archive?
tasks.description: Dua empty shells di apps/academic/ dengan nama pilot-relevant. clinical-simulator = training tool dokter, evaluation-engine = akurasi diagnosis evaluator. Keputusan timeline: pre-pilot, post-pilot, atau archive.
tasks.notes: Keputusan Chief: scaffold — assign ke Cursor.

tasks.title: [CHIEF] edge-ai-prototype: scaffold atau archive?
tasks.description: Empty shell di apps/prototype/edge-ai-prototype. Kalau bukan roadmap 3 bulan ke depan, archive untuk reduce noise di monorepo.
tasks.notes: Keputusan Chief: scaffold.

tasks.title: [CHIEF] Confirm agent-hermes Phase 3-8 roadmap alignment
tasks.description: Phase 1+2 complete & green. Phase 3-8 pending. agent-hermes = AI workforce foundation (28 skill domains, plugins, mission control). Align timeline Phase 3-8 dengan pilot prep — apakah paralel atau sequential?
tasks.notes: Keputusan Chief: private experiment — off task board, tidak di-assign ke agent.

tasks.title: Resolve naming: folder 'sentra-dashboard' vs package 'puskesmas-dashboard'
tasks.description: Pilih satu nama setelah Chief decide. Kalau pilih 'sentra-dashboard': update package.json name dari @the-abyss/puskesmas-dashboard. Kalau pilih 'puskesmas-dashboard': rename folder dan update semua workspace references.
tasks.notes: Package name aligned to @the-abyss/sentra-dashboard; workspace/docs references updated (Cursor session).

tasks.title: [CHIEF] Extract 144_penyakit + icd10 ke packages/clinical-data?
tasks.description: Dataset kritis dipakai di 4+ lokasi (sentra-dashboard, sentra-assist, public/data, output/). Extract ke packages/clinical-data untuk single source of truth. Tradeoff: bundle size vs duplication.
tasks.notes: Keputusan Chief: tetap di project folder masing-masing untuk pilot. Extract ke packages/clinical-data post-pilot.

tasks.title: Delete dead code: scripts/reset-crew-password.mjs
tasks.description: File tidak relevan dan tidak dipakai. Hapus dan commit dengan message: 'chore(sentra-dashboard): remove dead script reset-crew-password'.
tasks.notes: File already deleted in backup (confirmed by .agent/PROGRESS.md and HANDOFF.md)

tasks.title: Add .semgrep-out.json ke .gitignore sentra-dashboard
tasks.description: 720KB binary/output file ter-track di git. Add ke .gitignore, kemudian: git rm --cached .semgrep-out.json, commit perubahan.
tasks.notes: .semgrep-out.json in .gitignore; file not tracked — no rm --cached needed.

tasks.title: Stage & commit 187 files dari simplify pass sentra-dashboard
tasks.description: Review git diff, group jadi logical commits: (1) refactor/dedup components, (2) performance optimizations, (3) file renames/moves. Push ke branch feature/simplify-pass-2026-04-12.
tasks.notes: Staging simplify pass 400+ files successfully committed by Gemini (Supervisor) into feature/simplify-pass-2026-04-12. Grouped into 3 logical commits: (1) core/schema, (2) business logic/API, (3) UI/pages. Audit diff verified.

tasks.title: Resolve .agent/ vs .agents/ conflict di sentra-assist
tasks.description: Dua folder agent: .agent/ dan .agents/ (plural). Sesuai root LESSONS.md standard = .agent/ (singular). Merge isi .agents/ ke .agent/, hapus .agents/, update semua AGENTS.md references yang menyebut .agents/.
tasks.notes: Merged: coding-standard.md moved from .agents/rules to .agent/rules. Deleted .agents/ folder. Updated .gitignore.

tasks.title: Fix BOM character di config-typescript/package.json
tasks.description: Remove BOM (\uFEFF, byte sequence EF BB BF) dari awal package.json. Command: sed -i '1s/^\xef\xbb\xbf//' package.json — atau re-save sebagai UTF-8 without BOM di editor.
tasks.notes: package.json + tsconfig rewritten UTF-8 (no BOM) for tooling compatibility.

tasks.title: Fix BOM character di integration-bridge/package.json
tasks.description: Sama dengan P1-05. Remove BOM dari packages/integration-bridge/package.json.
tasks.notes: integration-bridge/package.json normalized UTF-8 JSON (batch with P1-05).

tasks.title: Add Vitest unit tests untuk fhir-engine package
tasks.description: Buat packages/fhir-engine/src/__tests__/fhir-engine.test.ts. Minimal 5 test cases: (1) transform valid FHIR R4 resource, (2) validate Patient resource, (3) validate Observation resource, (4) handle invalid input gracefully, (5) FHIR bundle parsing.
tasks.notes: Created 12 test cases: FhirValidator (Patient/Observation validation, errors), helper functions, FhirTransformer. All tests passed.

tasks.title: Add Vitest unit tests untuk vector-store package
tasks.description: Buat test file di packages/vector-store/src/__tests__/. Test: (1) upsert vector, (2) similarity query dengan threshold, (3) delete vector, (4) mock Pinecone/pgvector response, (5) error handling pada connection failure.
tasks.notes: Created 12 test cases: VectorStore (upsert, query with keyword matching, delete, count), createVectorStore factory. All tests passed.

tasks.title: Add Vitest unit tests untuk artificial-core package
tasks.description: Test prompt-manager: (1) template rendering dengan variable injection, (2) fallback ke default template, (3) multi-provider switching (Anthropic/OpenAI/Google), (4) token counting estimate, (5) error pada missing required variable.
tasks.notes: Created 16 test cases: PromptManager (register, get with variable substitution, list), AiCoreClient (generate, add/remove provider), getConsensus. All tests passed.

tasks.title: Fix CONTEXT.md duplicate rows (line 55 & 57)
tasks.description: Edit CONTEXT.md di root, remove duplicate 'Agent memory' rows. Scan seluruh file untuk duplicate rows lain. Commit: docs(root): fix duplicate rows in CONTEXT.md.
tasks.notes: Fixed. Removed duplicate Agent memory row at line 57 (kept line 55 which was more complete — included decisions, sessions/). Scanned full file: no other duplicates found.

tasks.title: Resolve pnpm-lock.yaml residual churn di root
tasks.description: 1490 add / 6156 del residual dari sentra-main session. Run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile → kalau fail, pnpm install → pnpm dedupe → commit clean lockfile.
tasks.notes: pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts (avvcenna+-memory sync); pnpm dedupe --ignore-scripts; pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts passes. Plain frozen install fails on Windows only: agent-hermes/vendor/hindsight prepare runs ./scripts/setup-hooks.sh (POSIX).

tasks.title: Add Vitest tests untuk orchestrator
tasks.description: Vitest sudah configured tapi tidak ada test files. Tambah minimal: (1) unit test base.saga.ts, (2) integration test health check endpoint, (3) Kafka message emit/receive mock test.
tasks.notes: vitest.config.ts + base.saga, kafka, health (unit + module compile) specs; B4-A satisfied.

tasks.title: Decide dan resolve proxy.disabled.ts di sentra-portal
tasks.description: File proxy.disabled.ts di src/ = code smell. Tiga opsi: (A) delete jika tidak akan dipakai, (B) rename ke proxy.ts dan restore dengan proper TODO comment, (C) move ke docs/ sebagai reference. Pilih dan execute.
tasks.notes: proxy.disabled.ts removed from src/; example moved to docs/proxy.disabled.example.ts

tasks.title: Review @google/genai vs @google/generative-ai overlap
tasks.description: Cek package.json sentra-dashboard — dua Google AI packages mungkin overlap. Cek actual import usage di codebase: grep -r '@google/genai\|@google/generative-ai' src/. Consolidate ke satu package yang dipakai.
tasks.notes: Removed unused @google/genai (^1.43.0) from sentra-dashboard/package.json. All 3 actual usages (voice/chat, cdss/engine, clinical/anamnesis-extractor) use @google/generative-ai — kept. @google/genai was declared but never imported anywhere.

tasks.title: Verify tsconfig.tsbuildinfo di .gitignore sentra-main
tasks.description: 236KB binary file. Cek: git ls-files | grep tsbuildinfo — kalau ter-track: add ke .gitignore, git rm --cached, commit.
tasks.notes: Added Next.js-oriented .gitignore including *.tsbuildinfo; tsbuildinfo not in git index.

tasks.title: Verify .next/ di .gitignore sentra-portal
tasks.description: Build folder .next/ tidak boleh ter-track. Cek git ls-files | grep .next — tambah ke .gitignore kalau belum ada.
tasks.notes: Verified: /.next/ and *.tsbuildinfo already present; added Playwright artifact dirs.

tasks.title: Verify .output/ & dist/ di .gitignore sentra-assist
tasks.description: WXT build output .output/ dan dist/ tidak boleh ter-track. Cek dan fix .gitignore.

tasks.title: Audit nested .git folders di sentra-portal, ferdiiskandar, primary-healthcare/website
tasks.description: Run: find . -name '.git' -not -path './.git' -type d. Untuk setiap nested .git: (1) kalau intentional submodule — document di .gitmodules, (2) kalau tidak intentional — git rm -r --cached <path>/.git.
tasks.notes: Recursive search under the three roots: no nested .git directories found.

tasks.title: Konsolidasi PROJECT_CONTEXT.md di primary-healthcare
tasks.description: Tiga PROJECT_CONTEXT.md: umbrella, database, website. Merge menjadi hierarchy: umbrella mendeskripsikan keseluruhan + pointer ke sub-context, database dan website punya context spesifik tanpa duplikasi.
tasks.notes: Created umbrella apps/healthcare/primary-healthcare/PROJECT_CONTEXT.md. Umbrella describes division overview + pointers to database/ and website/ sub-contexts. No info deleted — reorganized as hierarchy.

tasks.title: Migrate academic-solutions/AGENT_MEMORY.md ke .agent/ standard
tasks.description: Move AGENT_MEMORY.md ke .agent/MEMORY.md. Update referensi di AGENTS.md dan README kalau ada yang point ke AGENT_MEMORY.md.
tasks.notes: Moved AGENT_MEMORY.md to .agent/MEMORY.md in academic-solutions. No references found in AGENTS.md or README. Original deleted after copy.

tasks.title: Setup Vitest + Playwright di sentra-portal

tasks.notes: vitest + utils.spec.ts; Playwright e2e smoke for /dashboard/default, /dashboard/crm, /dashboard/analytics (actual routes). Fixed broken import on default dashboard page.

tasks.title: Fix naming inconsistency: avvcenna+ vs avvcenna+
tasks.description: avvcenna+-transformer vs avvcenna+-memory — typo di salah satu. Pilih: 'avvcenna+' (dengan e) sebagai brand. Rename avvcenna+-memory → avvcenna+-memory. Update package.json, workspace config, semua internal references.
tasks.notes: Renamed avvcenna+-memory → avvcenna+-memory. Updated: package.json name, AGENTS.md (all references), apps/community/AGENTS.md, .agent/ files (HANDOFF.md, PROGRESS.md, CONTEXT.md).

tasks.title: Document API surface untuk 12 packages
tasks.description: Untuk setiap package di packages/: (1) tambah JSDoc di semua public exports di index.ts, (2) update README.md dengan minimal: purpose, install, usage example, exports list. Priority: fhir-engine, vector-store, artificial-core, iskandar-gatekeeper.
tasks.notes: JSDoc added to all public exports in index.ts for 9 packages with code (fhir-engine, vector-store, artificial-core, iskandar-gatekeeper, database, langflow-client, sentra-ui, shared-types, integration-bridge). README.md created for all 11 packages without READMEs (design-token already had one). config-eslint and config-typescript received README only (no index.ts).

tasks.title: Add Playwright smoke tests untuk sentra-main

tasks.notes: playwright.config.ts (ESM __dirname), e2e/smoke.spec.ts: main landmark, /insights /story /privacy /terms, #contact + Join Waiting List CTA (no HTML form on site).
